sections.name: defaults
sections.description: Global defaults applied to every panel unless overridden per-panel or per-command.

keys.description: Provider-agnostic model identifier used when a panel does not specify one.
Engine used when the --engine flag is not passed on the command line.
Maximum number of debate rounds per panel.
Maximum number of experts per panel.
Soft per-expert response cap, measured in words.
Enable anonymous usage telemetry (command names only, never panel content).

sections.name: providers
sections.description: Per-provider settings for engines that authenticate with a standalone API key. Only the NAME of the environment variable holding the key is stored here, never the key value itself.

keys.description: Name of the environment variable holding the OpenAI API key, never the key value itself.
Name of the environment variable holding the Anthropic API key, never the key value itself.

sections.name: expert
sections.description: Expert-library settings governing document ingestion and memory decay.

keys.description: Number of days until an expert's memory weights decay by half.
File extensions eligible for expert document ingestion.

sections.name: documents
sections.description: Document-extraction settings, including the optional AI-extraction fallback and the file-size ceiling.

keys.description: AI-based text-extraction fallback for unknown or unsupported file formats.
Whitelist of extensions eligible for AI extraction; an empty list means every extension is eligible.
Maximum file size accepted by the document extractor, measured in megabytes.
Number of recent chat turns kept verbatim before summarization.
Maximum length, in words, of the rolling chat-history summary.
Warn the user once a chat exceeds this many turns.

sections.name: conclude
sections.description: Synthesis settings for the council conclude command.

keys.description: Character budget for transcript content in the synthesis prompt; older turns are dropped beyond it.
Directory holding user-facing expert and panel YAML files.

envVars.name: COUNCIL_HOME
envVars.purpose: Override the runtime directory that stores Council's database, logs, and config.yaml. Used by --ephemeral mode and tests to isolate state.

envVars.name: COUNCIL_DATA_HOME
envVars.purpose: Override the data directory for expert and panel YAML files. Takes precedence over paths.dataHome.

envVars.name: NO_COLOR
envVars.purpose: Disable ANSI color output when set to any non-empty value (follows the NO_COLOR standard).

envVars.name: COUNCIL_ASCII
envVars.purpose: Force an ASCII-only charset (set to 1), disabling Unicode box-drawing characters and emoji.

envVars.name: COPILOT_CLI_PATH
envVars.purpose: Override the auto-detected path to the GitHub Copilot CLI loader.

envVars.name: TERM
envVars.purpose: Standard terminal type; the value dumb switches Council to ASCII-only, no-color output.

envVars.name: CI
envVars.purpose: When set to true or 1, forces non-interactive rendering with no prompts or spinners.

envVars.name: ACCESSIBILITY
envVars.purpose: When set to 1, forces non-interactive, screen-reader-friendly rendering.

envVars.name: VISUAL
envVars.purpose: Editor launched by council config edit and other edit commands; checked before EDITOR.

envVars.name: EDITOR
envVars.purpose: Fallback editor launched by edit commands when VISUAL is unset.
